video_title: Guy Fieri Returns to *Legendary* Fried Chicken Joint  | Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives | Food Network

restaurants.name: Uncle Lou's
restaurants.guy_intro: I'm here in Memphis, Tennessee. Back in 2008, oh, I had my chicken world changed forever. Check this guy out, Uncle Lou's. Uncle Lou, Mr. Louis Martin, he's a one of a kind. He opened this joint back in 2001, and his chicken definitely made an impression on me.

dishes.description: Chicken dredged in seasoned flour (salt, pepper, onion, garlic, cinnamon) and deep-fried to a light, crunchy coating without an egg wash.
dishes.guy_response: That's good. Good crunch. That's why we don't do the egg wash. You cook that chicken skin. That's a crunchy chicken skin that people like.

dishes.description: Jumbo chicken tenderloins marinated for 48 hours in 'corruption' seasoning, dredged in flour, deep-fried, then tossed in 'sweet, spicy love' sauce.
dishes.guy_response: Wow, man. You're close to getting a hug right now. I say this when I do Triple D. I'm going to send them to you. The flavor town army is going to show up. Just be ready to handle them, and you have been.

dishes.dish_name: Sweet, Spicy Love Sauce (Honey Dip Sauce)
dishes.description: Award-winning sauce made with red wine vinegar, Louisiana hot sauce, 'corruption' seasoning, and double honey, brought to a boil and then heat turned off.
dishes.guy_response: Oh. That's like sweet, spicy love. Note that. You're like, what do you call this? I said, we call it honey dip. No, brother. No. Sweet, spicy love. Yeah. Name change.

dishes.description: Northern beans cooked in a pressure cooker, then drained and mixed with 'corruption' seasoning, salt, 'sweet, spicy love' sauce, and honey.
dishes.guy_response: There's a little bit of hot, a little bit of spice. Perfect. Black pepper, a little bit of sweet. Just fantastic.

dishes.description: Biscuits baked off, then brushed with melted butter and glazed with honey.
dishes.guy_response: This biscuit is like a biscuit donut. It's sweet. Honey buttery donut biscuit.
